title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is accepted and then revoked [Android]
scenario: User revokes location permission after onboarding and the app should gracefully handle Find My Device access with appropriate prompts to re-enable permission.
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete the onboarding process, accepting the location tracking permission when prompted.
2. Navigate to Settings > Apps > Poly Lens > Permissions on the Android device.
3. Revoke the location permission for the Poly Lens app.
4. Return to the app and access the 'Find My Device' feature.
5. Observe the app's behavior when attempting to use location services without permission.
expected: The app should gracefully handle the revoked location permission by showing an appropriate prompt explaining that location access is needed, and provide a way for the user to re-enable the location permission (e.g., by redirecting to the app's permission settings).
